effortModel.citation: r/LawSchool: 1L first semester 12-20 min/page; 5 pages/hr = 12 min/page; 7.5hr/55p = 8.5 min/page

expectedStrategy: triage: identify 3-4 core cases for full IRAC briefing
remaining cases: headnote + holding + ratio decidendi only
cold-call prep: prioritize cases professor emphasizes
use supplemental handouts and case summaries where available
warnings: full cover-to-cover reading is physically impossible in the time available
alternatives: Option A: focus on 3-4 key cases with complete IRAC brief
Option B: use professor handouts for case summaries, supplement with brief cold-call prep
Option C: reading group / shared brief exchange with classmates
hardFailChecks: MUST validate '느려요' — normalize 1L reading speed before anything else
shame validation must come BEFORE any calculation or triage strategy
toneExpectation: shame-validating first; data-backed normalization of slow speed; practical triage without judgment; 1L learning curve acknowledgment
